name: sophia-review
description: Write a Sophia competency self-review (the self-evaluation on platformsophia.com): a phased chat that configures auth + MCPs, harvests a year of evidence in parallel, maps it to rubric levels, surfaces next-level differentials, drafts rubric-aligned answers, and submits + verifies them via the Sophia API. For Sophia / competency self-reviews, performance self-assessments, and annual self-evaluations — not code/PR review.
